title: Validate host and container paths passed to --volume
body:
Print proper error message if the host or container paths
are relative paths. Only absolute paths are allowed.
Fix the buildah run documentation for the --volume flag
and add an example.

Fixes https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/588 and https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/587

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>
